title: oxystophyllum helvolum
intro: Oxystophyllum helvolum, also known as the "Heel Root", is a plant species belonging to the orchid family, native to the tropical forests of Australia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oxystophyllum helvolum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
